alternate_phrasings: Who is the owner of this portfolio?
answer: I am Dhanush Dhamodharan (Dhanu), a B.Tech Artificial Intelligence and Data Science undergraduate (CGPA: 8.91). I am an AI developer, Instagram tech content creator with a reach of over 2.5 Lakh+, and a dedicated placement coordinator. I love engineering intelligent, futuristic software systems and machine learning solutions that make a real difference.

alternate_phrasings: What technologies did you use for your portfolio?
Tell me about your portfolio design
answer: I designed and built this portfolio website as an interactive holographic terminal. It uses React, Vite, Tailwind CSS, and custom vanilla CSS for high-fidelity animations like canvas particles and 3D coverflow scrolling. It is integrated with my digital twin chatbot, DHANU_AI_CORE, to provide details about my work and academic milestones.
